name: Ian Handley
summary: Senior Software Engineer with 20+ years building and owning backend systems and distributed architectures. Expert in Go and Python, with deep experience in microservices, APIs, and cloud infrastructure (AWS, GCP). Proven track record leading teams and improving reliability and delivery. Actively exploring AI-driven workflows (agents, MCP, RAG) applied to real-world troubleshooting use cases.

work_experience.title: Senior Software Engineer
bullets: Owned Go-based backend services supporting high-volume chargeback systems (~millions of transactions/month)
Designed distributed systems across AWS and GCP improving system reliability and reducing incident frequency
Led a team of engineers for 2 years, improving delivery timelines and reducing deployment friction
Built REST APIs and internal tooling improving troubleshooting workflows for support teams
Explored AI agent and RAG-based approaches for domain-specific knowledge retrieval

work_experience.title: System Engineer
bullets: Architected big-data platform processing millions of insurance claims for healthcare insights
Built low-latency services integrating Salesforce, web systems, and medical devices

work_experience.title: Senior Software Engineer
bullets: Maintained messaging platform processing large-scale business-critical transactions
Re-architected validation systems using AWS improving scalability and reliability
Designed cross-platform messaging bridge (RocketMQ ↔ RabbitMQ) for international systems

work_experience.title: Senior Software Engineer
bullets: Developed microservices and APIs supporting supply chain optimization platforms
Designed containerized services (Docker/Kubernetes) improving deployment consistency

education.school: Community College of the Air Force
